nasb.text: From Tappuah the border continued westward to the brook of Kanah, and it ended at the sea. This is the inheritance of the tribe of the sons of Ephraim according to their families,

esv.text: From Tappuah the boundary goes westward to the brook Kanah and ends at the sea. Such is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Ephraim by their clans,

cnv.text: 又從他普亞向西行，到加拿河，直通到海；這就是以法蓮支派按著家族所得的產業。

ccb.text: 又从他普亚往西到加拿河，直到地中海。这就是以法莲的子孙按宗族所分的产业。
